OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope or type of data the connector is importing, either a MIME type or Stix Object (for information only).

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: ISO8601 Duration format starting with 'P' for Period (e.g., 'PT4H' for 4 hours).

CONNECTOR_UPDATE_EXISTING_DATA.description: Whether to update existing data in OpenCTI.

TI_API__URL.description: Group-IB Threat Intelligence API base URL.

TI_API__EXTRA_SETTINGS__IGNORE_NON_INDIC.description: Whether to ignore threat reports that do not contain indicators.
Whether to ignore threats that do not contain indicators.

TI_API__EXTRA_SETTINGS__IGNORE_NON_MALWA.description: Whether to ignore DDoS attacks that are not malware-related.

TI_API__EXTRA_SETTINGS__INTRUSION_SET_IN.description: Whether to use Intrusion Set instead of Threat Actor STIX type.

TI_API__EXTRA_SETTINGS__SCHEDULE_TIME.description: Schedule time for the connector (HH:MM format).

TI_API__EXTRA_SETTINGS__ENABLE_STATEMENT.description: Whether to enable statement markings on STIX objects.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__APT_THREAT__DEFAULT.description: Default start date for the APT Threat collection.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__APT_THREAT__LOCAL_C.description: Custom tag for the APT Threat collection.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__APT_THREAT__TTL.description: TTL in days for the APT Threat collection.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__APT_THREAT__USE_HUN.description: Whether to use hunting rules for the APT Threat collection.
